name: Qlife's End
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機殻の凍結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クリフォートダウン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Machine-Type/EARTH/Level 4/ATK 1800/DEF 1000). (This card is NOT treated as a Trap Card.) During the turn this card was Summoned this way, "Qli" Spell/Trap Cards you control cannot be destroyed by card effects. If Summoned this way, this card can be treated as 3 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of an "Apoqliphort" monster.
eff: Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Machine-Type/EARTH/Level 4/ATK 1800/DEF 1000). (This card is NOT treated as a Trap Card.) During the turn this card was Summoned this way, "Qli" Spell/Trap Cards you control cannot be destroyed by card effects. If Summoned this way, this card can be treated as 3 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of an "Apoqliphort" monster.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
